channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Beck throws for 2 TDs, runs for another to lead No. 11 Georgia past No. 6 Tennessee 31-17
item.description: ATHENS, Ga. (AP) — On a raucous Saturday night between the hedges, Carson Beck once again looked like a quarterback who could lead Georgia to another national title. Showing off his arm and his legs, Beck silenced his critics by throwing for two touchdowns and running for another, leading the No.
item.dc:creator: PAUL NEWBERRY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: PREVIEW: GJ Tigers football in round 2 of the playoffs vs. Ponderosa
item.description: For the first time since 2011, it is mid-November and the Grand Junction Tigers are still practicing football.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: No. 13 Purdue rediscovers strong post presence in 87-78 win over No. 2 Alabama
item.description: Boilermakers forward Trey Kaufman-Renn made 12 of 23 shots, scored a career-high 26 points and grabbed eight rebounds as No. 13 Purdue handed No. 2 Alabama an 87-78 defeat that was eerily reminiscent of last season's 92-86 loss to the Boilermakers in Toronto.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: NYU women's basketball team holds national title ceremony
item.description: GREENWICH VILLAGE, Manhattan (PIX11) — The NYU women’s basketball team kicked off their home game Friday night with a ring ceremony honoring last season’s historic, undefeated run that earned them the national championship.
item.dc:creator: Zhané Caldwell, PIX 11

item.title: Rodgers plans to return to Jets for 2025 season
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- Did you see the parade? The celebration? Missed it? So did I. When New York Jets quarterback Aaron Rodgers said he has every intention of playing in 2025, the announcement was met with a groan.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Former Detroit Lions player charged over Capitol riot
item.description: A former Detroit Lions linebacker was arrested and charged with allegedly assaulting law enforcement and other offenses over the Jan. 6, 2021, Capitol riot, according to the Department of Justice (DOJ).
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, WGN 9

item.title: Watch out MLB! Keep an eye out for Roki Sasaki
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- As all the attention in baseball is focused on Juan Soto, Scott Boras, and his free agency, there is another that should draw attention as well. That is Japanese righty Roki Sasaki. The 23-year-old really flashed in the World Baseball Classic a couple of years ago.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Olympic champion Lindsey Vonn is ending her retirement at age 40 to make a skiing comeback
item.description: Lindsey Vonn is coming out of retirement to rejoin the U.S. Ski Team, she announced Thursday, intending to race again at age 40 — and six years after her last Olympics.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Mitchell Chaffee's journey to the Tampa Bay Lightning
item.description: Making it to the NHL is a huge accomplishment for forward Mitchell Chaffee, especially as an undrafted player. Not only did he beat the odds, he’s overcome a serious injury.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Collins scores 29, but Jazz fall to Suns, 120-112
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Jazz got big contributions from John Collins and rookie Kyle Filipowski, but it wasn't enough to slow down the Phoenix Suns Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: BYU ranked 6th in College Football Playoff poll
item.description: PROVO, Utah (AB4 Sports) - It was one of the most thrilling victories in BYU history, and will go down as a true rivalry classic. But perhaps what was even more thrilling for the Cougars than their 22-21 win over Utah Saturday night, was the reception they received late Saturday night in Provo.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: 18-year-old arrested for throwing water bottle at football game between U of U, BYU
item.description: An 18-year-old was arrested after reportedly throwing a water bottle onto the field during the BYU-Utah game on Nov. 9.
item.dc:creator: Trevor Myers, ABC 4

item.title: Three Padres win Silver Slugger Award
item.description: Three Padres on Tuesday were announced as winners of the Silver Slugger Award in the National League.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: Interim Oakland Roots head coach gets promoted
item.description: (KRON) – Oakland Roots Soccer Club Interim Head Coach Gavin Glinton can finally ditch the “interim” of his title. The soccer club announced that Glinton has been promoted to full-time Head Coach ahead of the 2025 United Soccer League Championship season.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: Bucs' Rachaad White celebrates local students’ completion of financial literacy program
item.description: Financial education at an early age can help young people lower debt and increase savings and credit scores as they mature into adulthood, according to the FDIC.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: A's star Miller left off AL Rookie of the Year finalists
item.description: (KRON) -- Athletics star closer Mason Miller will not be the American League Rookie of the Year. MLB announced the finalists for the award on Monday, and Miller was not included. Miller invigorated fans in the team's final season in Oakland with a fastball that ticked up to 104 miles per hour.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: 2024 Silver Pigskin Gala Awards
item.description: The Ballots for the 2024 Silver Pigskin Gala Awards have been released today to over 200 local coaches, PPR staff, former winners, local media, and influencers to vote on the best players in the county.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Utah athletic director fined $40,000 by Big 12 Conference
item.description: The Big 12 fine is considered stiff, as the three athletic director fines of note in the past decade were all $25,000.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, NewsNation

item.title: Bucs with Bowles looks at team's frustrating record entering the bye week
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers have reached their bye week, banged up, two games under the .500 mark, and trailing in a division race that may require the Bucs to be perfect for the remainder of the season.
item.dc:creator: Dan Lucas, WFLA, NBC
